goal: Propose and validate a significantly better method than current SHARD under the same broad honest-but-curious gradient-leakage setting. Prioritize Stage 2 / snapshot disaggregation and mitigation of the overly strong requirement for access to every intermediate local-round gradient. Stage 3-only polish is no longer sufficient; the full three-stage SHARD design may be discarded if a better solution respects the threat model.
domain_notes: Working folder: 06.TALON/. SHARD simulator vendored at vendor/shard_sim/ (no runtime import from 01.SHARD). 01.SHARD is optional read-only for the LaTeX paper only.
